en: What would I bring to the relationship? Get back into the right lane. What's the first thing you do?
First thing I do is I put on my blinker. Oh, wait.
ko: 제일 먼저 방향지시등을 켜. 아, 잠깐.

en: Watch the road! Watch the road! All right. Stop.
Then I look in my mirror. Okay.
ko: 그 다음 내 거울을 봐. 좋아.

en: Then I glance at my blind spot.
Glance with your head, not the whole car. I swear to God. I swear to God, woman.
ko: 머리로 확인해야지, 차 전체로는 안 돼. 맹세코. 맹세코, 여자야.

en: You can't drive for ****. I'm not trying to hear that. Hear me.
ko: 너 운전 못해. 그 소리 듣고 싶지 않아. 내 말 들어. 안 돼.

en: Actually, going all the way is like a really big decision.
ko: 사실, 모든 걸 다 하는 건 정말 큰 결정이야.

en: I can't believe I was so capricious about it.
ko: 내가 그렇게 변덕스러웠다니 믿을 수 없어.

en: D, I almost had sex with him. You almost had sex with who?
ko: D, 나 그와 거의 섹스할 뻔했어.

en: Yo, look. Are you **** blind or something?
Your man Christian is a cake boy. A what?
ko: 네 남자 크리스찬은 케이크 보이야. 뭐라고?

en: He's a disco dancer, Oscar Wilde reading, holding friend of Dorothy. Know what I'm saying?
ko: 그는 디스코 댄서고, 오스카 와일드를 읽고,

en: Uh-uh. No way. He's gay. Not even. Yes, even.
